title: Creative Mode Gather Bypass Guard
description:
The recovery handler's fast-path for 'not in inventory' errors creates Gather:missingBlock goals even in creative mode. In creative mode the adapter should handle inventory via creative.setInventorySlot() — gathering raw materials (e.g. mining sand for glass_pane) is unnecessary and causes the bot to wander hundreds of blocks away from the build site. 

Fix: Add IsCreativeMode guard before the gather recovery path in TryRecoverFromGameErrorAsync. In creative mode, log a debug message and return early instead of creating a gather sub-goal.

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Implemented in Sprint 51 Wave B+. Fix adds _worldState.IsCreativeMode guard before TryExtractMissingMaterial gather path. See AgentBackgroundService.cs TryRecoverFromGameErrorAsync.
